scientific_risk_if_ignored: Friction, entrance, and pressure-ladder decisions can be biased if viscosity or velocity basis changes.
Thermal-development and bulk-to-TP models can shift because Pr enters Gz and Nu correlations.

depends_on_property_lanes: rho/beta, mu or nu, wall-bulk DeltaT, orientation
scientific_risk_if_ignored: Buoyancy importance can be misclassified if beta or DeltaT basis is not released.
Natural/mixed-convection interpretation becomes overclaimed without property and DeltaT release.
Reverse-flow or mixed-convection switches cannot use Ri thresholds until same-basis UQ exists.
Thermal-development projection can be overfit if reset/Gz is not source-bounded.
Pressure residual can be misassigned to K/F6 instead of density/buoyancy.
Transient or retained-window drift could be hidden as heat residual if cp/mass ownership is missing.
Missing heat can be incorrectly absorbed into internal Nu unless property/source lanes are explicit.

depends_on_property_lanes: cp, mu, k, Re, Pr, Gz, source sign
scientific_risk_if_ignored: D2-like empirical offsets could be mistaken for a released projection model.
